ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the movie's IMDb page */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDb rating of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received on IMDb */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or slogan of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification or rating (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "production_status" TEXT /* Current production status (e.g., pre-production, post-production, released) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the director's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the review has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the review has received */,
  "spoiler_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the review contains spoilers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., viewer, admin) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date the user was last active */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie added to the watchlist */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the movie was added to the watchlist */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the watchlist entry (e.g., planned, watched) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "user_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that is rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the movie */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for the movie */,
  "interactions" INTEGER /* Total interactions (likes, shares) on the movie */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the movie has received */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of shares the movie has received */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments the movie has received */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie based on user ratings */,
  "most_recent_activity" TEXT /* Date of the most recent activity related to the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the production company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's logo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_companies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "company_id")
)
